classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整图中对应蓝框侧视图，显示电机机身、轴伸、引出线及铭牌位置，并标注'20±1'、'52'、'15±0.2'、'1.5'、'4.5±0.1'、'Ø5 +0 -0.013'等外形与轴径尺寸公差，属于机械结构尺寸图。

title.title_zh: 电机侧视外形及轴伸尺寸
title.title_en: Motor Side View Overall and Shaft Extension Dimensions

text_annotations.correction_note: Kept the complete high-confidence OCR reading and discarded overlapping partial readings.
Merged split vertical OCR fragments ?5, 0+, and -0.013 into the visible shaft diameter tolerance callout Φ5 +0/-0.013.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized from OCR diameter-symbol variants for engineering readability.
± is preserved as a bilateral tolerance symbol.

dimension_records.reason: Horizontal dimension line spans the main motor body length.
Horizontal dimension line from shaft end to mounting face indicates shaft extension length.
Horizontal dimension line references the stepped portion of the shaft.
Short horizontal dimension near the front face indicates the narrow shoulder or flange thickness.
Vertical dimension is attached to the shaft profile; interpreted as shaft flat or local height dimension rather than overall diameter.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Diameter 5 mm, upper deviation +0 mm, lower deviation -0.013 mm
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径 5 mm，上偏差 +0 mm，下偏差 -0.013 mm
dimension_records.reason: Rotated diameter callout beside the shaft is reconstructed from split OCR fragments and matches standard shaft diameter tolerance notation.

frontend_table_records.specification: Diameter 5 mm, upper deviation +0 mm, lower deviation -0.013 mm

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 直径 5 mm，上偏差 +0 mm，下偏差 -0.013 mm

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front shoulder/face thickness is 1.5 mm; other mounting details are not visible in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft extension is 20±1 mm, stepped length is 15±0.2 mm, shaft diameter is Φ5 with +0/-0.013 mm tolerance, and local shaft flat/height dimension is 4.5±0.1 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main motor body length in this side view is 52 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector or lead dimensions are visible graphically but no usable OCR text callout is present in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Nameplate text is visually present but has no OCR source_id in the provided boxes, so it is not included as a text annotation.

unresolved_items.issue: Discarded OCR noise, overlapping partial readings, or line/shape misrecognitions not suitable as independent engineering callouts.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR captured numeric value only; visible callout includes square symbol.
OCR captured numeric tolerance; visible callout includes square symbol.
Merged split OCR pieces and corrected ?22 to Φ22 with upper deviation -0 and lower deviation -0.05.
OCR captured 2.5min; visible callout includes depth/minimum symbol.

terminology_notes: □ indicates square dimension or square bolt pattern.
AWG is a wire gauge designation, not a dimensional unit.

dimension_records.reason: Top horizontal dimension defines the square front face outer size.
Dimension between mounting hole centers on the front face.

Depth/minimum symbol is associated with the mounting threaded hole callout.
Vertical dimension alongside cable bundle defines lead length.
Leader points to the cable bundle and text specifies wire standard and gauge.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机'励磁顺序'表，列出绕组线色与相位名称'红 A+'、'红白 A−'、'绿 B+'、'绿白 B−'，并用加减号表示顺时针和逆时针励磁接线时序，属于电机动力相线/绕组接线关系定义。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
